# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'URL of the build artifact to download (S3, Artifactory, HTTP). Example: https://my-bucket.s3.amazonaws.com/builds/app-1.0.0.tar.gz'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Expected SHA256 checksum of the artifact (optional but recommended)'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'TARGET_ENVIRONMENT',
            choices: ['staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Target environment for deployment'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_SERVERS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of target server hostnames/IPs. Example: prod-server-01,prod-server-02'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_PATH',
            defaultValue: '/opt/application',
            description: 'Deployment path on target servers'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_USER',
            defaultValue: 'deploy',
            description: 'SSH user for deployment'
        )
        credentials(
            name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: 'deploy-ssh-key',
            description: 'SSH credentials for connecting to target servers',
            credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.jenkins.plugins.sshcredentials.impl.BasicSSHUserPrivateKey'
        )
        credentials(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Credentials for accessing the artifact URL (optional, for authenticated sources)',
            credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.plugins.credentials.impl.UsernamePasswordCredentialsImpl',
            required: false
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'DRY_RUN',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'If true, download and verify artifact but do not deploy'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'BACKUP_CURRENT',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Backup current deployment before deploying new artifact'
        )
        string(
            name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_URL_PATH',
            defaultValue: '/health',
            description: 'Health check endpoint path to verify deployment (e.g., /health)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_PORT',
            defaultValue: '8080',
            description: 'Port for health check endpoint'
        )
    }

    environment {
        WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        WORKSPACE_BACKUP = "${WORKSPACE}/backups"
        DEPLOY_TIMESTAMP = sh(script: 'date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S', returnStdout: true).trim()
    }

    options {
        timeout(time: 30, unit: 'MINUTES')
        timestamps()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20'))
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
    }

    stages {

        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def errors = []

                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL?.trim()) {
                        errors << "ARTIFACT_URL is required"
                    } else {
                        def url = params.ARTIFACT_URL.trim()
                        if (!(url.startsWith('https://') || url.startsWith('http://') || url.startsWith('s3://'))) {
                            errors << "ARTIFACT_URL must start with https://, http://, or s3://"
                        }
                    }

                    if (!params.DEPLOY_SERVERS?.trim()) {
                        errors << "DEPLOY_SERVERS is required"
                    }

                    if (!params.DEPLOY_PATH?.trim()) {
                        errors << "DEPLOY_PATH is required"
                    }

                    if (params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT == 'production' && !params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM?.trim()) {
                        echo "WARNING: Deploying to production without checksum verification is not recommended!"
                    }

                    if (errors) {
                        error("Parameter validation failed:\n${errors.collect { "  - ${it}" }.join('\n')}")
                    }

                    // Parse servers list
                    env.SERVER_LIST = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }.join(',')
                    def serverCount = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').size()
                    echo "Deployment Plan:"
                    echo "  Artifact URL: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                    echo "  Target Environment: ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}"
                    echo "  Target Servers (${serverCount}): ${env.SERVER_LIST}"
                    echo "  Deploy Path: ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                    echo "  Dry Run: ${params.DRY_RUN}"
                    echo "  Backup Current: ${params.BACKUP_CURRENT}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Prepare Workspace') {
            steps {
                sh """
                    rm -rf "${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}" "${WORKSPACE_BACKUP}"
                    mkdir -p "${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}" "${WORKSPACE_BACKUP}"
                """
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactUrl = params.ARTIFACT_URL.trim()
                    def filename = artifactUrl.tokenize('/').last().tokenize('?').first()
                    env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME = filename
                    env.ARTIFACT_FILEPATH = "${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}/${filename}"

                    echo "Downloading artifact: ${filename}"

                    if (artifactUrl.startsWith('s3://')) {
                        // AWS S3 download
                        echo "Detected S3 URL, using AWS CLI for download"
                        sh """
                            aws s3 cp "${artifactUrl}" "${env.ARTIFACT_FILEPATH}" --no-progress
                        """
                    } else if (params.ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()) {
                        // Authenticated HTTP download
                        withCredentials([usernamePassword(
                            credentialsId: params.ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS_ID,
                            usernameVariable: 'ART_USER',
                            passwordVariable: 'ART_PASS'
                        )]) {
                            sh """
                                curl -fsSL --retry 3 --retry-delay 5 \
                                    -u "\${ART_USER}:\${ART_PASS}" \
                                    -o "${env.ARTIFACT_FILEPATH}" \
                                    "${artifactUrl}"
                            """
                        }
                    } else {
                        // Unauthenticated HTTP download
                        sh """
                            curl -fsSL --retry 3 --retry-delay 5 \
                                -o "${env.ARTIFACT_FILEPATH}" \
                                "${artifactUrl}"
                        """
                    }

                    // Verify file was downloaded
                    def fileExists = sh(script: "test -f '${env.ARTIFACT_FILEPATH}' && echo 'true' || echo 'false'", returnStdout: true).trim()
                    if (fileExists != 'true') {
                        error("Artifact download failed: file not found at ${env.ARTIFACT_FILEPATH}")
                    }

                    def fileSize = sh(script: "stat -c%s '${env.ARTIFACT_FILEPATH}' 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z '${env.ARTIFACT_FILEPATH}'", returnStdout: true).trim()
                    echo "Downloaded artifact: ${filename} (${fileSize} bytes)"

                    if (fileSize == '0') {
                        error("Downloaded artifact is empty (0 bytes)")
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Artifact Checksum') {
            when {
                expression { return params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def expectedChecksum = params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM.trim().toLowerCase()
                    def actualChecksum = sh(
                        script: "sha256sum '${env.ARTIFACT_FILEPATH}' | awk '{print \$1}'",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim().toLowerCase()

                    echo "Expected SHA256: ${expectedChecksum}"
                    echo "Actual SHA256:   ${actualChecksum}"

                    if (expectedChecksum != actualChecksum) {
                        error("Checksum verification FAILED! Artifact may be corrupted or tampered with.")
                    }

                    echo "Checksum verification PASSED"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Inspect Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def filename = env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME
                    def filepath = env.ARTIFACT_FILEPATH

                    def fileType = sh(script: "file '${filepath}'", returnStdout: true).trim()
                    echo "File type: ${fileType}"

                    // Determine artifact type and extraction method
                    if (filename.endsWith('.tar.gz') || filename.endsWith('.tgz')) {
                        env.ARTIFACT_TYPE = 'tar.gz'
                        echo "Artifact contents (top-level):"
                        sh "tar -tzf '${filepath}' | head -20"
                    } else if (filename.endsWith('.tar.bz2')) {
                        env.ARTIFACT_TYPE = 'tar.bz2'
                        sh "tar -tjf '${filepath}' | head -20"
                    } else if (filename.endsWith('.zip')) {
                        env.ARTIFACT_TYPE = 'zip'
                        sh "unzip -l '${filepath}' | head -20"
                    } else if (filename.endsWith('.war') || filename.endsWith('.jar') || filename.endsWith('.ear')) {
                        env.ARTIFACT_TYPE = 'java-archive'
                        sh "unzip -l '${filepath}' | head -20"
                    } else if (filename.endsWith('.deb')) {
                        env.ARTIFACT_TYPE = 'deb'
                        sh "dpkg-deb --info '${filepath}' 2>/dev/null || true"
                    } else if (filename.endsWith('.rpm')) {
                        env.ARTIFACT_TYPE = 'rpm'
                        sh "rpm -qip '${filepath}' 2>/dev/null || true"
                    } else {
                        env.ARTIFACT_TYPE = 'binary'
                        echo "Binary artifact - will be deployed as-is"
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Production Approval') {
            when {
                allOf {
                    expression { return params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT == 'production' }
                    expression { return !params.DRY_RUN }
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',')
                    def approvalMessage = """
                        Deploy to PRODUCTION?
                        
                        Artifact: ${env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}
                        Servers: ${servers.join(', ')}
                        Deploy Path: ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}
                        Backup Enabled: ${params.BACKUP_CURRENT}
                    """.stripIndent()

                    timeout(time: 10, unit: 'MINUTES') {
                        input(
                            message: approvalMessage,
                            ok: 'Deploy to Production',
                            submitter: 'admin,release-managers'
                        )
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Backup Current Deployment') {
            when {
                allOf {
                    expression { return params.BACKUP_CURRENT }
                    expression { return !params.DRY_RUN }
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',')

                    sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                        for (server in servers) {
                            echo "Backing up current deployment on ${server}..."

                            def backupResult = sh(
                                script: """
                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} '
                                        DEPLOY_PATH="${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                                        BACKUP_DIR="${params.DEPLOY_PATH}_backups"
                                        TIMESTAMP="${DEPLOY_TIMESTAMP}"
                                        
                                        if [ -d "\${DEPLOY_PATH}" ] || [ -f "\${DEPLOY_PATH}" ]; then
                                            mkdir -p "\${BACKUP_DIR}"
                                            
                                            # Create backup
                                            if [ -d "\${DEPLOY_PATH}" ]; then
                                                tar -czf "\${BACKUP_DIR}/backup_\${TIMESTAMP}.tar.gz" -C "\$(dirname \${DEPLOY_PATH})" "\$(basename \${DEPLOY_PATH})"
                                            else
                                                cp "\${DEPLOY_PATH}" "\${BACKUP_DIR}/\$(basename \${DEPLOY_PATH})_\${TIMESTAMP}.bak"
                                            fi
                                            
                                            # Cleanup old backups (keep last 5)
                                            cd "\${BACKUP_DIR}" && ls -t | tail -n +6 | xargs -r rm -f
                                            
                                            echo "Backup created successfully"
                                        else
                                            echo "No existing deployment found at \${DEPLOY_PATH}, skipping backup"
                                        fi
                                    '
                                """,
                                returnStatus: true
                            )

                            if (backupResult != 0) {
                                echo "WARNING: Backup failed on ${server}, but continuing deployment"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy Artifact') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',')
                    def deployResults = [:]

                    sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                        for (server in servers) {
                            echo "=========================================="
                            echo "Deploying to ${server}..."
                            echo "=========================================="

                            try {
                                // Upload artifact to server
                                sh """
                                    scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
                                        "${env.ARTIFACT_FILEPATH}" \
                                        ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server}:/tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}
                                """

                                // Deploy on the remote server
                                sh """
                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} '
                                        set -e
                                        
                                        ARTIFACT="/tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}"
                                        DEPLOY_PATH="${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                                        ARTIFACT_TYPE="${env.ARTIFACT_TYPE}"
                                        
                                        echo "Preparing deployment directory..."
                                        mkdir -p "\${DEPLOY_PATH}"
                                        
                                        echo "Stopping application service (if applicable)..."
                                        if command -v systemctl &> /dev/null; then
                                            SERVICE_NAME=\$(basename "\${DEPLOY_PATH}")
                                            sudo systemctl stop "\${SERVICE_NAME}" 2>/dev/null || echo "No systemd service found for \${SERVICE_NAME}, skipping stop"
                                        fi
                                        
                                        echo "Deploying artifact..."
                                        case "\${ARTIFACT_TYPE}" in
                                            tar.gz)
                                                tar -xzf "\${ARTIFACT}" -C "\${DEPLOY_PATH}" --strip-components=1 2>/dev/null || tar -xzf "\${ARTIFACT}" -C "\${DEPLOY_PATH}"
                                                ;;
                                            tar.bz2)
                                                tar -xjf "\${ARTIFACT}" -C "\${DEPLOY_PATH}" --strip-components=1 2>/dev/null || tar -xjf "\${ARTIFACT}" -C "\${DEPLOY_PATH}"
                                                ;;
                                            zip|java-archive)
                                                if [ "\${ARTIFACT_TYPE}" = "java-archive" ]; then
                                                    cp "\${ARTIFACT}" "\${DEPLOY_PATH}/"
                                                else
                                                    cd "\${DEPLOY_PATH}" && unzip -o "\${ARTIFACT}"
                                                fi
                                                ;;
                                            deb)
                                                sudo dpkg -i "\${ARTIFACT}"
                                                ;;
                                            rpm)
                                                sudo rpm -Uvh "\${ARTIFACT}"
                                                ;;
                                            binary)
                                                cp "\${ARTIFACT}" "\${DEPLOY_PATH}/"
                                                chmod +x "\${DEPLOY_PATH}/\$(basename \${ARTIFACT})"
                                                ;;
                                            *)
                                                cp "\${ARTIFACT}" "\${DEPLOY_PATH}/"
                                                ;;
                                        esac
                                        
                                        # Run post-deploy script if present
                                        if [ -f "\${DEPLOY_PATH}/post-deploy.sh" ]; then
                                            echo "Running post-deploy script..."
                                            chmod +x "\${DEPLOY_PATH}/post-deploy.sh"
                                            cd "\${DEPLOY_PATH}" && ./post-deploy.sh
                                        fi
                                        
                                        echo "Starting application service (if applicable)..."
                                        if command -v systemctl &> /dev/null; then
                                            SERVICE_NAME=\$(basename "\${DEPLOY_PATH}")
                                            sudo systemctl start "\${SERVICE_NAME}" 2>/dev/null || echo "No systemd service found for \${SERVICE_NAME}, skipping start"
                                        fi
                                        
                                        # Cleanup uploaded artifact
                                        rm -f "\${ARTIFACT}"
                                        
                                        echo "Deployment completed on \$(hostname)"
                                    '
                                """

                                deployResults[server] = 'SUCCESS'
                                echo "Deployment to ${server} completed successfully"

                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                deployResults[server] = 'FAILED'
                                echo "ERROR: Deployment to ${server} failed: ${e.getMessage()}"
                                currentBuild.result = 'UNSTABLE'
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    // Summary
                    echo "\n=========================================="
                    echo "Deployment Summary:"
                    echo "=========================================="
                    deployResults.each { server, result ->
                        echo "  ${server}: ${result}"
                    }

                    def failedServers = deployResults.findAll { it.value == 'FAILED' }.keySet()
                    if (failedServers.size() == servers.size()) {
                        error("Deployment failed on ALL servers: ${failedServers.join(', ')}")
                    } else if (failedServers) {
                        echo "WARNING: Deployment failed on some servers: ${failedServers.join(', ')}"
                    }

                    env.DEPLOY_RESULTS = deployResults.collect { "${it.key}=${it.value}" }.join(',')
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Dry Run Summary') {
            when {
                expression { return params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                echo """
                    ==========================================
                    DRY RUN COMPLETE
                    ==========================================
                    Artifact: ${env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}
                    Type: ${env.ARTIFACT_TYPE}
                    Would deploy to: ${env.SERVER_LIST}
                    Deploy path: ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}
                    Environment: ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}
                    
                    No changes were made to any servers.
                """.stripIndent()
            }
        }

        stage('Health Check') {
            when {
                allOf {
                    expression { return !params.DRY_RUN }
                    expression { return params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL_PATH?.trim() }
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',')
                    def healthResults = [:]
                    def maxRetries = 10
                    def retryInterval = 6 // seconds

                    echo "Waiting 15 seconds for services to start..."
                    sleep(time: 15, unit: 'SECONDS')

                    for (server in servers) {
                        // Skip servers that failed deployment
                        if (env.DEPLOY_RESULTS?.contains("${server}=FAILED")) {
                            echo "Skipping health check for ${server} (deployment failed)"
                            healthResults[server] = 'SKIPPED'
                            continue
                        }

                        echo "Running health check on ${server}..."
                        def healthy = false

                        for (int attempt = 1; attempt <= maxRetries; attempt++) {
                            def healthStatus = sh(
                                script: """
                                    curl -sf --max-time 10 \
                                        "http://${server}:${params.HEALTH_CHECK_PORT}${params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL_PATH}" \
                                        -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}'
                                """,
                                returnStdout: true,
                                returnStatus: false
                            ).trim()

                            // returnStatus:false means it will return stdout; if curl fails we catch exception
                            if (healthStatus == '200') {
                                healthy = true
                                break
                            }

                            if (attempt < maxRetries) {
                                echo "  Attempt ${attempt}/${maxRetries}: HTTP ${healthStatus}, retrying in ${retryInterval}s..."
                                sleep(time: retryInterval, unit: 'SECONDS')
                            }
                        }

                        if (!healthy) {
                            // Retry with exit code check
                            def finalCheck = sh(
                                script: """
                                    curl -sf --max-time 10 \
                                        "http://${server}:${params.HEALTH_CHECK_PORT}${params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL_PATH}"
                                """,
                                returnStatus: true
                            )
                            healthy = (finalCheck == 0)
                        }

                        healthResults[server] = healthy ? 'HEALTHY' : 'UNHEALTHY'
                        echo "  ${server}: ${healthResults[server]}"
                    }

                    echo "\n=========================================="
                    echo "Health Check Summary:"
                    echo "=========================================="
                    healthResults.each { server, result ->
                        echo "  ${server}: ${result}"
                    }

                    def unhealthyServers = healthResults.findAll { it.value == 'UNHEALTHY' }.keySet()
                    if (unhealthyServers) {
                        currentBuild.result = 'UNSTABLE'
                        echo "WARNING: The following servers are unhealthy: ${unhealthyServers.join(', ')}"
                        echo "Consider rolling back the deployment."
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            script {
                if (params.DRY_RUN) {
                    echo "Dry run completed successfully."
                } else {
                    echo "Deployment completed successfully!"
                    echo "Artifact: ${env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}"
                    echo "Servers: ${env.SERVER_LIST}"
                    echo "Environment: ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}"
                }
            }
        }

        failure {
            script {
                echo "DEPLOYMENT FAILED!"
                echo "Artifact: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                echo "Servers: ${env.SERVER_LIST ?: params.DEPLOY_SERVERS}"
                echo "Environment: ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}"

                if (params.BACKUP_CURRENT && !params.DRY_RUN) {
                    echo """
                        ==========================================
                        ROLLBACK INSTRUCTIONS
                        ==========================================
                        Backups are available at: ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}_backups/
                        Backup timestamp: ${env.DEPLOY_TIMESTAMP}
                        
                        To rollback manually on each server:
                          1. Stop the application service
                          2. Remove current deployment: rm -rf ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/*
                          3. Restore backup: tar -xzf ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}_backups/backup_${env.DEPLOY_TIMESTAMP}.tar.gz -C \$(dirname ${params.DEPLOY_PATH})
                          4. Restart the application service
                    """.stripIndent()
                }
            }
        }

        unstable {
            echo "Deployment completed with warnings. Please check the health of deployed services."
        }

        always {
            // Cleanup workspace artifacts
            sh """
                rm -rf "${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}" "${WORKSPACE_BACKUP}" 2>/dev/null || true
            """
        }
    }
}
